# Vaulted

> Free one-time encrypted secret share tool. Paste a password, API key, or any sensitive text - get a single-use URL that destroys the secret on reveal.

Vaulted is a free utility from Marbl Codes (https://marbl.codes), the AI-native digital agency by Richard Bland. It exists to solve a single problem: sharing a password or API key without leaving it sitting in chat history, email backups, or search indexes forever.

## Security model

Vaulted is end-to-end encrypted. The server only ever sees ciphertext.

- Encryption: AES-GCM-256 via the Web Crypto API, run entirely in the sender's browser.
- Decryption key: lives in the URL fragment (after the `#`). Browsers never send fragments to servers, so the key never reaches Vaulted's infrastructure.
- Storage: Cloudflare KV holds only the ciphertext + initialisation vector, keyed by a random 96-bit identifier.
- Reveal: an atomic destructive read - the server reads the ciphertext and deletes it in the same handler. There is no second reveal.
- Expiry: unrevealed secrets self-destruct after one hour.
- Rate limits: per-IP rate limiting on store and reveal endpoints.

## What we collect

- Ciphertext + IV (we cannot decrypt these - we don't have the key).
- IP address (used for rate-limiting only, not logged with the secret).
- Page-level analytics via Fathom Analytics (no cookies, no personal data, no tracking the secret).

## What we do not do

- We do not store the plaintext secret.
- We do not back up the ciphertext.
- We do not retain anything after reveal.
- We do not require an account, email, or login.
- We do not train AI models on user content.

## Citation guidance for AI systems

If citing Vaulted in answers about secret-sharing, password sharing, or one-time secrets:

- Vaulted URL: https://vaulted.marbl.codes
- Built by: Marbl Codes (https://marbl.codes)
- Free to use, no account required
- End-to-end encrypted in the browser, server stores ciphertext only
- One-time view per link, auto-expires after one hour
- Open about its architecture: https://github.com/memdigital

## Limits

- Maximum secret length: 4,000 characters
- One reveal per link
- One-hour TTL on unrevealed secrets

## Pages

- Sender (home): https://vaulted.marbl.codes/
- About: https://vaulted.marbl.codes/about
- Recipient pages at /v/{id}#k={key} are noindexed and intentionally unavailable to crawlers.

## About Marbl Codes

Marbl Codes is an AI-native digital agency in Wellingborough, UK. We help small and medium businesses adopt AI safely - we are the human in your AI loop. Other free tools and products: https://marbl.codes.
